{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":1198},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7384732573430399806","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，希望无不要有女主，大部分感情线就是爽文的累赘，有女主粉转黑谢谢，看到后面会再次评论的，目前没看到（大概），作者加油，写的很好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719415914,"group_id":"7361734637057494078","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"梦想是当个无忧无虑的中二病！欸嘿★","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3lMWLUpW3NVUSDu/wSE6uc=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c9c1ba7f9d6d45b59c01b96f94a338b2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535881&x-signature=bOBedQcNSDY7Q%2BrsC1aRlMkwNMU%3D","user_id":"75213614622727","user_name":"云山千狸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"75213614622727","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1744603716,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7361734637057494078","book_info":{"abstract":"灵气复苏，神话擂台降临，各国本土神明接踵而至，樱花唤醒天照大神，鹰酱联邦召唤奥丁，希拉召唤宙斯……唯独华夏文脉缺失，岌岌可危！
而我意外穿越而来，恍然发现，自己掌握了完整的华夏神话体系！
“区区大夏也敢跟我们比神明数量？”
“诶…等等！你们看他手里面拿的是什么？那么厚一本神谱？假的吧？”
楚云微微一笑：“就喜欢你们这没见过世面的样子，你们认出神明取决于资料，我认出神明取决于出来了几位神，你们拿什么与我比？”
可曾听闻，千古一帝嬴政，凡人之躯可弑神王！
甲子荡魔，一人一剑，踏遍神州山河，斩尽世间魔头！煌煌大世，再无魔……
开天之首，盘古大尊，斧可开天！荡尽众神？
这一日，我大夏境内，西方神明……禁行！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/afe849326b72f1b35cf9f3514aa84033","author":"开门送温暖","author_id":"","book_id":"7361734637057494078","book_name":"笑我华夏无神？我开局觉醒亿万神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":514,"name":"灵气复苏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=514&name=灵气复苏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7361798148894755865","read_count":"43678","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2695128"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"971","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,开局,灵气复苏,国运","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/aed56dfd15097c70d42e66e1f938a187~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779164021&x-signature=W0SAhJPDx%2FkdLYRH9NqUx1s4yGc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.0744099e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":59,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10743,"reply_count":8,"show_pv":35021},"user_act r":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7396344430265910041","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的无可挑剔，神明为自己的信徒献身，国民也愿意信奉神明，国宝回归，文物回归，让我热泪盈眶，不圣母，目前还没有女主，希望作者继续更下去！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722099917,"group_id":"7361734637057494078","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个喜欢爽文的书迷","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwh9g9PhoqPupQW1Jvxc0rM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/73532946a9cd4ec3ba994a8d7facb6b5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528944&x-signature=qv9NMcWm4k2NN%2F2jUOMMhLKRAoo%3D","user_id":"563369410301848","user_name":"黑衣书包"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"563369410301848","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1729348018,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7361734637057494078","book_info":{"abstract":"灵气复苏，神话擂台降临，各国本土神明接踵而至，樱花唤醒天照大神，鹰酱联邦召唤奥丁，希拉召唤宙斯……唯独华夏文脉缺失，岌岌可危！
而我意外穿越而来，恍然发现，自己掌握了完整的华夏神话体系！
“区区大夏也敢跟我们比神明数量？”
“诶…等等！你们看他手里面拿的是什么？那么厚一本神谱？假的吧？”
楚云微微一笑：“就喜欢你们这没见过世面的样子，你们认出神明取决于资料，我认出神明取决于出来了几位神，你们拿什么与我比？”
可曾听闻，千古一帝嬴政，凡人之躯可弑神王！
甲子荡魔，一人一剑，踏遍神州山河，斩尽世间魔头！煌煌大世，再无魔……
开天之首，盘古大尊，斧可开天！荡尽众神？

楚云微微一笑：“就喜欢你们这没见过世面的样子，你们认出神明取决于资料，我认出神明取决于出来了几位神，你们拿什么与我比？”
可曾听闻，千古一帝嬴政，凡人之躯可弑神王！
甲子荡魔，一人一剑，踏遍神州山河，斩尽世间魔头！煌煌大世，再无魔……
开天之首，盘古大尊，斧可开天！荡尽众神？
这一日，我大夏境内，西方神明……禁行！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/afe849326b72f1b35cf9f3514aa84033","author":"开门送温暖","author_id":"","book_id":"7361734637057494078","book_name":"笑我华夏无神？我开局觉醒亿万神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":514,"name":"灵气复苏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=514&name=灵气复苏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7361798148894755865","read_count":"43678","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2695128"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"971","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,开局,灵气复苏,国运","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/aed56dfd15097c70d42e66e1f938a187~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779164021&x-signature=W0SAhJPDx%2FkdLYRH9NqUx1s4yGc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"164"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":14,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":23001,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":22806},"user_action":{"aut
